Table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LINEAGE

Card of table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LINEAGE

Name

FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LINEAGE

Code

FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LINEAGE

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LINEAGE

Fact table based on T_ATLAN_BULK_IMPACT_REPORT extracted from Atlan

No RLS as this table is a dictionary

Historization: SCD1

Load type: DELTA

 

 

FACT KEY - MD5(ASSET_GUID_BK + IMPACTED_ASSET_GUID_BK+VALID_FROM)

VALID_FROM- 1900-01-01 00:00:00


Check constraint name of the table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LINEAGE

CKT_FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LINEAG


Server validation rule of the table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LINEAGE

%RULES%


Code preview of the table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LINEAGE

drop table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LINEAGE cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LINEAGE
--==============================================================
create or replace table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LINEAGE (
FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LINEAGE_KEY VARCHAR(32) not null,
ASSET_GUID_BK VARCHAR(1024) not null,
IMPACTED_ASSET_GUID_BK VARCHAR(1024) not null,
LINEAGE_POSITION VARCHAR(1024),
constraint PK_FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LINEAGE primary key (FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LINEAGE_KEY)
not enforced
);

alter table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LINEAGE set comment = 'Table provides a lineage-centric view of metadata relationships across systems, assets, and dependencies. It enables business users and data owners to assess how changes to upstream tables or columns may affect downstream dashboards, KPIs, and reports-supporting impact analysis, risk mitigation, and trust in data pipelines.';

comment on column FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LINEAGE.FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LINEAGE_KEY is
'Artificial key generated to uniquely identify each record';

comment on column FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LINEAGE.ASSET_GUID_BK is
'Globally unique identifier of the source asset.';

comment on column FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LINEAGE.IMPACTED_ASSET_GUID_BK is
'Globally unique identifier of the impacted asset.';

comment on column FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LINEAGE.LINEAGE_POSITION is
'Indicates whether the asset is upstream or downstream.';

alter table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LINEAGE
add constraint FK_FACT_PHY_RELATIONS_DIM_BRID foreign key (FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LINEAGE_KEY)
references DIM_BRIDGE_PHYSICAL_ASSET_DEPENDENCY (FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LINEAGE_KEY)
not enforced not deferrable;
